# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

**Do not open a public issue for security vulnerabilities.**

Please report security issues privately using [GitHub's security advisory feature](../../security/advisories/new).

Include:
- Description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce
- Potential impact

Maintainers aim to acknowledge receipt within 48 hours and provide a timeline for a fix.

## Supported Versions

<!-- Replace with your actual support policy. -->

Only the latest release is supported with security updates.
